title: Low Water
description: Low Water is a shader pack for any Minecraft Java Edition version. It's a simple, lightweight, shader pack built for low-end-devices. It adds refractions, waves, and reflections to vanilla water, adding a bit of comfort.
body:
Low Water is a shader pack for any Minecraft Java Edition version. It's a simple, lightweight, shader pack built for low-end-devices. It adds refractions, waves, and reflections to vanilla water, adding a bit of comfort.

**_We strive to let people with low end devices feel good about how Minecraft looks._**
